meta_title: For Founders: Git with AI to Solve no project ideas (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Git with AI and overcome no project ideas. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Git with AI to Solve No Project Ideas
content.seo_description: Learn how to use Git with AI to overcome project paralysis. A high-level tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code to build profitable SaaS MVPs fast.
content.answer_block: Stop waiting for the 'perfect' idea. Use AI-driven Git workflows to iterate on micro-SaaS concepts rapidly. By leveraging Antigravity for architectural scaffolding and Claude Code for rapid implementation, you can validate market demand through code-first experimentation rather than endless theorizing, turning abstract problems into deployable, revenue-generating software assets.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the graveyard of founders. You have the technical stack, the ambition, and the hunger to scale, but you're trapped in the agonizing limbo of 'no project ideas.' The truth is, ideas aren't found; they are engineered through the friction of execution. The most successful founders don't wait for inspiration; they build their way to it.

Today, we shift your paradigm. We are using a high-velocity Git-based workflow powered by Antigravity and Claude Code to treat your codebase as a laboratory. We aren't just writing code; we are building a machine that spins up, tests, and pivots SaaS prototypes in hours, not weeks. It is time to stop thinking and start shipping.

steps.title: Define the Market Gap with AI
steps.description: Before writing code, use Antigravity to analyze high-frequency pain points in your niche to ensure your MVP has a built-in audience.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze current trends in [Niche] and identify three B2B SaaS problems that are currently underserved by existing software. Output a JSON structure with Problem, Target Audience, and Revenue Potential.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create a project roadmap for [Selected Idea] focusing on MVP features only'

steps.title: Scaffold the MVP Architecture
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate a production-ready boilerplate that is pre-configured for deployment, saving you days of setup.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean, scalable Next.js and Supabase project structure for a SaaS MVP. Include authentication, stripe integration, and a responsive UI layout.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'initialize project with the generated boilerplate and set up the git repository'

steps.title: Build the Core Value Loop
steps.description: Focus exclusively on the one feature that solves the primary pain point. Use Claude Code to build the logic while you focus on business validation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write the backend service logic for the primary value-add feature. Ensure the code is modular and follows clean architecture principles.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement the core feature logic and add unit tests for the primary user flow'

steps.title: Automate Git-Driven Deployment
steps.description: Configure your CI/CD pipeline so that every commit triggers a deploy, forcing you to maintain a shippable product state at all times.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs tests and deploys to Vercel upon every push to the main branch.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'add the .github/workflows/deploy.yml file and configure environment variables'

steps.title: Iterate via Feedback Loops
steps.description: Use your live MVP to gather real data. Use Git branches to manage pivots based on actual user engagement metrics.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the following user feedback and suggest a pivot for the current feature set that increases retention.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create a new branch for the pivot feature and refactor the existing user flow'

pro_tips: Always commit your 'why' in the git message; treat your commit history as a business log for investors.
Use Claude Code to document your API endpoints automatically as you write them to save hours of manual maintenance.
Never build more than 3 screens for an MVP; if it takes more, your value proposition is too complex.
Use environment variables for everything; keep your business logic clean of secrets to ensure easy portability.
Automate your database migrations with AI-generated scripts to prevent schema-drift during rapid pivots.
content.next_steps: Deploy your MVP to a staging environment, share it with five potential users in your target demographic, and use the feedback to drive your next Git commit.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical leverage to out-build your competitors. The only thing missing is the momentum you create by starting. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.

Focus exclusively on the one feature that solves the primary pain point. Use Claude Code to build the logic while you focus on business validation.

Use your live MVP to gather real data. Use Git branches to manage pivots based on actual user engagement metrics.
